children.label: Account, Login & Profile Corrections
I cannot log in
I forgot my password
children.responseText: Use the Forgot Password link on the login page. If the email is not registered or the reset fails, visit the ICT Help Desk at the ICT Building during working hours (8am-4pm Mon-Fri) with your student ID card.

children.label: I know my details, but I still cannot log in
children.responseText: Your account may be locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Visit the ICT Help Desk at the ICT Building during working hours (8am-4pm Mon-Fri) with your student ID card, or use the Forgot Password link.

children.label: My account shows Invalid Username/Password
children.responseText: This usually means your JAMB number or matric number is not correctly mapped in the system. Bring your JAMB registration slip and student ID to the ICT Help Desk for verification.

children.label: My name is misspelt
children.responseText: To correct your name, bring your original JAMB CAPS printout and a valid ID to the ICT Help Desk. The correction takes 2-3 working days after JAMB-side validation.

children.label: My date of birth is wrong
children.responseText: Bring your original NIN slip or birth certificate to the ICT Help Desk. Corrections are processed within 2-3 working days after document verification.

children.label: My passport or signature needs to be changed
children.responseText: Log in to the portal and update your passport or signature from the Profile section. If the upload fails or the change does not reflect, escalate to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID.

children.label: My name order is incorrect
children.responseText: Name order corrections require ICT review and JAMB-side validation. Visit the ICT Help Desk with your JAMB CAPS printout and student ID card.

children.label: My phone number is wrong on the portal
children.responseText: To update your phone number on the portal, visit the ICT Help Desk with your student ID card. Bring proof of your correct phone number if available.

children.label: Portal Session, Level & Status Updates
I am a spillover student and need my portal moved to the current session
children.responseText: Session update requires backend processing. Visit the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and a letter from your department confirming your spillover status.

children.label: I resumed after deferment or suspension and my level is wrong
children.responseText: Bring your approved resumption or deferment letter to the ICT Help Desk. Level corrections are processed after document verification.

children.label: I need an extension of studies
children.responseText: An approved extension letter from the Senate or Academic Affairs office is required. Submit the letter at the ICT Help Desk for portal update.

children.label: My portal shows the wrong semester
children.responseText: School fees typically cover both semesters. Proceed with registration for the required semester. If the portal still blocks you after payment, escalate to the ICT Help Desk.

children.label: My matric number shows the wrong year
children.responseText: Matric number year corrections require backend update. Visit the ICT Help Desk with your admission letter and student ID card.

children.label: My level is incorrect
children.responseText: Bring a letter from your department or faculty confirming your correct level to the ICT Help Desk. The update is processed within 1-2 working days.

children.label: Course Registration & Carryovers
I cannot add a course
The course is not appearing on my portal
children.responseText: This is usually a curriculum or course-mapping issue. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and the course code. Your department may also need to update the curriculum mapping.

children.label: I need to drop a course
children.responseText: Course add/drop is normally handled by your Departmental Exam Officer. Contact your department first. If the portal does not allow the change after departmental approval, escalate to ICT.

children.label: A carryover course is appearing multiple times
children.responseText: Duplicate carryover records need to be cleaned up in the backend. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and the affected course code.

children.label: A course from another department appears on my list
children.responseText: Stray course records need to be removed from your registration. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and the course code to be removed.

children.label: I cannot register because of unit limits
Exceeded maximum credit units
children.responseText: Reduce your registered units by dropping extra courses until you are within the allowed limit. If you believe the unit calculation is wrong, contact your Departmental Exam Officer.

children.label: Minimum units not met
children.responseText: Add more courses until you meet the minimum required units for your level. If the required courses are not available on your portal, escalate to the ICT Help Desk.

children.label: I cannot register because my fees are not cleared
children.responseText: Your school fees payment may not have synced with the portal. Attach your payment receipt or RRR to this complaint. The ICT Help Desk will verify the payment sync with the finance system.

children.label: My course registration keeps timing out
children.responseText: Registration timeouts are usually caused by server load during peak periods. Try again during off-peak hours (early morning or late evening). If the problem persists, report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID.

children.label: My registered courses disappeared from my dashboard
children.responseText: This may be caused by a system rollback or sync issue. Report immediately to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID so the records can be restored.

children.label: My course form says No Curriculum Provided
children.responseText: The curriculum for your department or programme has not been mapped in the system. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and department name so the mapping can be set up.

children.label: Payments & Fees
I made a payment but it is not reflecting on my portal
children.responseText: Attach your receipt, transaction ID, or RRR to this complaint. Payment sync verification usually takes 24-48 hours. If it has been longer, the ICT Help Desk will escalate to the finance team.

children.label: My portal shows an outstanding balance even though I paid in full
children.responseText: This may be caused by fee mapping errors, indigene/non-indigene status mismatch, or hidden charges. Attach your payment receipt and report to the ICT Help Desk for manual verification.

children.label: Convocation fee still appears after graduation
children.responseText: The convocation fee flag needs to be removed from your record. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and proof of graduation or clearance.

children.label: I paid twice or need a refund or transfer
children.responseText: Duplicate payments require manual financial adjustment. Attach receipts for both payments and report to the ICT Help Desk. The case will be forwarded to the Bursary for processing.

children.label: NELFUND payment is not showing or payment was duplicated
children.responseText: NELFUND payment sync issues require backend verification. Attach your NELFUND payment confirmation and report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and transaction details.

children.label: ID card payment issue
children.responseText: Confirm that your ID card payment has been made and the module is active. Attach your payment receipt and report to the ICT Help Desk if the payment is not reflecting.

children.label: My school fees portal is not loading
children.responseText: The school fees portal may be temporarily down or undergoing maintenance. Try again after 30 minutes. If the problem persists, report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and a screenshot of the error.

children.label: I need to change my payment method
children.responseText: Payment method changes must be processed through the Bursary or ICT Help Desk. Visit the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and details of the payment method you wish to use.

children.label: Printing & Document Generation
Course form
Printing is blocked by credit limits
children.responseText: Check that you have met the minimum required units and removed any extra courses that exceed the maximum. Once units are within range, the print option should become available.

children.label: Printing is blocked by payment status
children.responseText: This is usually a payment sync issue. Attach your payment receipt and report to the ICT Help Desk for manual verification and unlock.

children.label: Printing is blocked by missing curriculum
children.responseText: The curriculum for your programme has not been set up in the system. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and department so the curriculum can be mapped.

children.label: Exam card
I have not done biometrics
children.responseText: Please visit the ICT Help Desk at the ICT Building during working hours (8am-4pm Mon-Fri) with your student ID card to complete biometric capture. Exam card printing will be available after biometrics are done.

children.label: Biometrics are already done but I still cannot print
children.responseText: Exam card generation requires ICT review. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID. Ensure your school fees and course registration are also complete.

children.label: My admission letter is not generating
children.responseText: Admission letter generation issues are usually caused by incomplete profile data or a portal configuration error. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and JAMB registration number.

children.label: Transcript
children.responseText: Transcript application errors usually require curriculum mapping or module review. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and the specific error message you are seeing.

children.label: Other print error
children.responseText: Report the specific document you are trying to print and the error message to the ICT Help Desk. Include a screenshot if possible.

children.label: Results, Grades & Academic Records
I have Fail Absent for a course I sat for
children.responseText: Visit your department with your exam card and timetable as proof of attendance. If the department confirms the error, they will forward a correction request to the ICT Help Desk.

children.label: I have an incorrect grade
children.responseText: Grade corrections go through the department and faculty board. Contact your Departmental Exam Officer with your answer script or score sheet. The correction must be approved before ICT can update the portal.

children.label: My result says Not yet approved by Senate
children.responseText: This means the Senate approval flag has not been set for your result. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID. This is usually resolved after the next Senate meeting.

children.label: My CGPA or CPA seems wrong
children.responseText: CGPA errors are often caused by duplicate course records or missing grades. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and a list of the courses you believe are affected.

children.label: My SIWES or summer result is missing
children.responseText: SIWES and summer results are uploaded separately. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and your SIWES completion letter or summer school result slip.

children.label: My result is showing Incomplete
children.responseText: An Incomplete result usually means your score was not fully uploaded by the lecturer. Contact your Departmental Exam Officer first. If unresolved, escalate to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and course code.

children.label: I need to carry over a course but it is not showing
children.responseText: Carryover courses that are not appearing may be due to a curriculum mapping issue or a missing fail record. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and the course code.

children.label: I need result verification
children.responseText: Start with departmental verification. Your Exam Officer will confirm the result and forward any corrections to the ICT Help Desk. If the department has already verified and the portal is still wrong, escalate here.

children.label: Biometrics, ID Card & Transcript
Biometrics not captured or Visit ICT message
children.responseText: Please visit the ICT Help Desk at the ICT Building during working hours (8am-4pm Mon-Fri) with your student ID card to complete biometric capture.

children.label: I cannot print my ID card
children.responseText: ID card printing issues may be caused by an ID card module error or payment sync problem. Attach your payment receipt and report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID.

children.label: I need to update my passport or signature
children.responseText: Log in to the portal and update your passport or signature from the Profile section. If the upload fails or the change does not reflect after 24 hours, escalate to the ICT Help Desk.

children.label: Transcript application error
children.responseText: Transcript errors usually require curriculum mapping or transcript module review. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and the specific error message.

children.label: Other identity or document issue
children.responseText: Describe your issue in detail and report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and any supporting documents.

children.label: Staff-Specific or Departmental Admin Complaints
Departmental curriculum issue
children.responseText: Escalate with your department name, programme, and a list of the affected courses. The ICT Help Desk will work with the department to update the curriculum mapping.

children.label: Bulk student data update
children.responseText: Bulk updates require administrative processing. Provide a spreadsheet or list of affected students with the required corrections. Submit to the ICT Help Desk for review.

children.label: Course mapping issue affecting many students
children.responseText: Department-wide course mapping issues should be reported with the course code, programme, and level affected. The ICT Help Desk will prioritize resolution to unblock all affected students.

children.label: Other administrative correction
children.responseText: Provide the relevant administrative details, affected student IDs, and the nature of the correction required. The ICT Help Desk will review and process accordingly.

children.label: Hostel & Accommodation
My hostel allocation is not showing
children.responseText: Hostel allocation display issues may be caused by a portal sync error. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and proof of hostel fee payment. The allocation record will be verified and restored.

children.label: I need to change my hostel room
children.responseText: Room change requests are handled by the Dean of Students Affairs office, not the ICT Help Desk. Please visit the Dean of Students Affairs office with your student ID and hostel allocation slip.

children.label: My hostel fee payment is not reflecting
children.responseText: Attach your hostel fee payment receipt or RRR to this complaint. The ICT Help Desk will verify the payment sync with the finance system. Ensure you have the correct transaction ID ready.

children.label: Graduation & Clearance
My name is not on the graduation list
children.responseText: Missing names on the graduation list may be due to outstanding fees, incomplete clearance, or a data entry error. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and proof of clearance or fee payment.

children.label: I cannot complete my clearance on the portal
children.responseText: Portal clearance issues may be caused by outstanding fees, missing documents, or a system error. Report to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID and details of the step where the portal is blocking you.

children.label: My certificate has an error
children.responseText: Certificate errors such as wrong name, date, or programme must be reported to the ICT Help Desk with your student ID, a copy of the certificate, and supporting documents showing the correct information.

children.label: Other / Not Listed
children.responseText: Please describe your issue in detail.
